field.expression: select PERSONAL_TARJETA.tarjeta FROM PERSONAL_TARJETA where PERSONAL_TARJETA.idPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and STR_TO_DATE('[__hastafecha__]', '%d/%m/%Y') > PERSONAL_TARJETA.fechaDesde order by PERSONAL_TARJETA.fechaDesde DESC limit 1
field.label: Tarjeta
Horas
Proyeccion
field.expression:
select SEC_TO_TIME(sum(FF.minutos)) from (select F1.fecha,
@egr2:= (SELECT H.egresoPremio from HORARIOHIST as H where H.horario = [__idJornada__] and H.desdeFecha <= F1.fecha and H.dia = DAYOFWEEK(F1.fecha) order by H.desdeFecha DESC limit 1) as "egr", @ing2:= (SELECT H.ingresoPremio from HORARIOHIST as H where H.horario = [__idJornada__] and H.desdeFecha <= F1.fecha and H.dia = DAYOFWEEK(F1.fecha) order by H.desdeFecha DESC limit 1) as "ing",
ifnull( time_to_sec( timediff( @egr2 , @ing2 )), 0)
as "minutos"
from GEN_CALENDAR as F1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = F1.fecha where F1.fecha >= '[__desdefecha__]' and F1.fecha <= '[__hastafecha__]' and isnUll(FERIADOS.idFeriado)) as FF
